{{Class 0|color-h=254|color-s=36%|color-l=35%}}
'''Level 239''' is the 240th level of the Backrooms.
{{Underline|000000}}
=Description= {{Blurimage|file=Arbardarbardar.png|caption=One of the many hallways present on this level.}}The vast majority of the structure and form of '''Level 239''' is comprised of an expansive conglomeration of interconnected, identical hallways. These sets of winding corridors seem to extend on endlessly, without any clear pattern or order, and all halls on this level all curve slightly, which further contributes to the chaotic design of this level. No resources, i.e. food and water, are present on this level, but this level also lacks any entities, making it relatively safe to traverse through. The level itself seems to be constructed in a more modern style of architecture. The concrete walls are coated in a thin coating of tan paint, and also do not show any signs of deterioration or damage. On the floor lies a large wool carpet, embellished with a beautiful Sakura flower pattern. Sets of wooden doors can be found on either side of the halls, however they cannot be opened using regular methods, as all wooden doors are sealed shut. Ornate paintings of colorful flowers can be found illuminated by lights, attached to the walls at even intervals between the aforementioned doors. The hallways are not the only area present on this level as there is an even more expansive "outer" area located beyond the boundaries of the corridors. Three exits to this area are present in the halls: windows, which are shown in the image above; large glass doors, present at the end of certain hallways; and the last being a relatively rare white wooden door, replacing one of the regular wooden doors. These doors can be opened, albeit with some minor difficulties at times. {{Blurimage|file=Ggggggg.png|caption=The outside.}} This section of the level takes the form of a vast landscape of rocks and boulders. There is a distinct absence of any form of vegetation or life in this place. The conditions are reminiscent of the Atacama Desert in Chile, meaning hyper-aridity (extremely dry) and a temperature hovering around 10°C (50°F). The time of day never changes, always being locked at nighttime. The sky is constantly covered in a beautiful array of stars, however none of these stars can be matched with any of the stars present in [[The Frontrooms]], and the moon is also strangely absent in the night sky. The stars in the sky also appear to periodically shift positions at seemingly random intervals. It is rumored that there is a mysterious building of sorts located at an unknown location in this area, however this cannot be confirmed as of now. Video logs have been found quite far out here, but they cannot be accessed by anyone.
{{Underline|000000}}
=Video Logs= These video logs have not been able to be accessed by anyone so far, however you may try to. {{Collapse|initial=> OPEN LOG AE1|final=> CLOSE LOG AE1|num=700|body=
''Open File "AE1.mp4"''
===
'''LOG AE1 - DATE UNKNOWN - BEGIN LOG'''
=== {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
why are we even here in the first place..?
i already told you.
there probably isn't even a temple here anyway. we aren't conspiracy theorists lily.
this is one of mia's last bits of research.
and?
we.. we have to at least try to rescue her.
...
..i can't pretend. i can't pretend like i still have hope that she hasn't been lost. but.. i just..
...
..w-want to talk to her again. in some way. i know i.. i.. i.. don't know.
we have to try right?
y-yeah.{{Underline|FFFFFF}} ===
'''END LOG AE1'''
===
}} }} {{Collapse|initial=> OPEN LOG AE2|final=> CLOSE LOG AE2|num=35|body=
''Open File "AE2.mp4"''
===
'''LOG AE2 - DATE UNKNOWN - BEGIN LOG'''
=== {{Underline|FFFFFF}}
...
[[File:Zzzz.png|center|frameless|400x400px]] this.. this should be it.
wow..- i..
it's a lot smaller than i was expecting.
''soft footsteps echo for around 2 minutes.''
uh..
i don't think this ritual is going to work. but.. what other options do i have?
...
let's.. do it together.
alright.
''beyond this world, beyond this earth''
''the stars will call, and take their eyes''
''a silent scream, that won't be heard''
''their voice, their ears will truly die''
''and may they rest among the stars''
''may they escape these iron bars''
''one day, we'll join the void beyond''
''and truly..''
'''''may we rest among the stars.'''''
...
''the silence is broken by the sound of sobbing.''
{{Underline|FFFFFF}} ===
'''END LOG AE2'''

{{Underline|000000}}
=Entrances and Exits= ===Entrances=== *Sakura flower carpets in any level will eventually fade here. *Noclipping through a patch of sakura-themed carpet in [[Level 238]] leads one here. *The most consistent way to get here is finding a wooden door with a star pattern carved into it found randomly in the buildings of [[Level 11]], or extremely rarely in [[Level 0]]. *Noclipping through any window in [[Level 699]]. *Noclipping through a sakura-themed door in [[Level 48]]. ===Exits=== *Monotone doors will lead to [[Level 899]]. *Glass ceilings will lead to [[Level 13]].
}} {{Underline|000000}}
